problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: Perovskite crystal structure optimization may resolve What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
